creator: achilov-rn@askd.ru
text:
FreeBSD 6.2-STABLE on Gigabyte P35-S3 motherboard. intel P35-based.
After applying patch for support ICH9 (kern/114473) system works quite
good, but when it booting, it does not initialize any USB HID device
(keyboard, mouse). I have using Genius TwinTouch Optical Value+
keyboard+mouse wireless combo. When I plug USB cord out and plug it
in system detects USB HID and works as usually (with USB mouse - very
bad, but this is another story)

Fix: 

Temporarly - plug out and plug in USB cord
How-To-Repeat: Install 6.2 on any Intel P35-based mainboard and try to boot with USB keyboard
